impact:
First real perf baseline from /data/logs/perf.log post-ISS-013 (commit f5f9296). Sample size is small (n=1-5 per route from one user-browsing session), but several authed routes clearly exceed acceptable latency:

| Route | n | p50 | p95 | max | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| /tools/activity | 5 | 156 | 6194 | 6194 | One request at 6.2s — likely cold/empty cache; warm requests fast. Investigate cache priming. |
| ~~/dashboard/corp-stats~~ | — | — | — | — | **FIXED 4aaa5cc** — SWR. Cold 1388ms (once per container), warm 6-9ms. |
| ~~/tools/fitting/saved~~ | — | — | — | — | **FIXED f751d7c** — DPS calc deferred to /tools/fitting/saved/dps. Warm 61ms (-91%), cold 1154ms (-42%). |
| ~~/dashboard/kill-pulse~~ | — | — | — | — | **FIXED b1daf2c** — SWR. Cold 785ms, warm 8-22ms (-97%). |
| ~~/dashboard/combat-profile~~ | — | — | — | — | **FIXED b1daf2c** — SWR. Cold 672ms, warm 13-24ms (-97%). |
| /industry/calculate | 2 | 734 | 734 | 734 | Acceptable for the work it does; flag if it grows. |
| /character/<id> | 1 | — | 711 | 711 | Full character detail page render. May not be cacheable since it's the primary view. |
| /dashboard | 2 | 615 | 615 | 615 | Top-level dashboard render. |

What was fine: /admin (117ms), /map (86ms), /tools/fitting (186ms).

Remaining: /tools/activity 6s outlier (need more samples to know if it's cold-cache one-off or sustained); /character/<id> 711ms; /dashboard 615ms. /industry/calculate likely acceptable.

Pattern that's working: stale-while-revalidate on dashboard lazy panels. SQL aggregates over killmails benefit massively because the warm path drops to template-render only.
title: Several authed routes exceed 500ms p95 — perf baseline from ISS-013
